name: maxtac-web
description: Web application, API, browser-state, and SaaS workflow research pack for MaxTAC.

interface.shortDescription: Web, API, session, and browser research.
interface.longDescription: MaxTAC for Web adds web surface triage, stateful API fuzzing, browser debugging, and web-focused auditor routing for authorized web application and SaaS targets.
defaultPrompt: Use MaxTAC for Web to triage this authorized web target.
Use MaxTAC for Web to map this API workflow and select auditors.
